metadata.title: Field Service | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered field service management platform for all your field operations — from route optimization and scheduling to dispatch, invoicing, and mobile workforce management.

hero.title: Field service.
hero.description: Optimize routes, schedule, dispatch, invoice, and manage field teams with one integrated timesheets and billing flow.

dashboard.title: Field Service
dashboard.subtitle: My Tasks / All Tasks / Planning / Reporting

hero.floatingNote: Drag and drop your day on the map

planSection.title: Great plan = great
planSection.description: Planning operations, work orders, and tasks is much easier when your team knows where to go, what to do, and what comes next.

mobileSection.title: All-in-one
mobileSection.description: Everything you need in your pocket. Access powerful mobile tools to manage tasks, track time, capture signatures, and invoice on-site.

labels.recordTime: Record time spent on each appointment
labels.trackParts: Keep track of your parts and manage invoices

invoicingSection.title: Carefree
invoicingSection.description: Invoice customers, add products, track timesheets, and turn field service work into billable revenue.
invoicingSection.floatingNote: Create invoices directly from the task

features.title: Calendar view
features.description: Simplify planning, drag and drop appointments, and manage every technician's schedule.

features.title: Map view
features.description: Plan routes, group nearby interventions, and reduce unnecessary travel.

features.title: Quote view
features.description: Manage customer needs, generate quotes, and track related services.

features.title: Mobile availability
features.description: Workers get everything they need on-site from a mobile-friendly interface.

features.title: Time tracking
features.description: Launch timers, track exact intervention time, and invoice service hours.

features.title: Invoice from Sales orders
features.description: Attach products, services, timesheets, and generate invoices quickly.

calendarDemo.title: Calendar view
calendarDemo.description: Simplify planning and drag appointments directly in your calendar.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: The purchasing time for accounting documents prior to analysis is now reduced from 2 days to only 5 hours.
testimonial.name: Arthur Green
